sourceOverview.notes: TTS-1 Max (#1 on Artificial Analysis). $10/M chars. Sub-200ms. Gaming/agent focused.

activeModelsSummary.tts:
Inworld TTS 1.5 Max [inworld-tts-1.5-max]
Inworld TTS 1.5 Mini [inworld-tts-1.5-mini]

audit.priceRangeSummary: TTS pricing examples: Mini $5/M chars, Max $10/M chars.
audit.limitsSummary: 100 RPS for TTS in docs. STT and LLM are exposed more as routed/runtime features than as simple fixed model catalogs.
audit.regionSummary: Enterprise options include EU and India residency, on-prem, and zero-retention modes.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: 15 languages (en, zh, ja, ko, ru, it, es, pt, fr, de, pl, nl, hi, he, ar).
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Depends on routed provider and experimental backend.
audit.freeTierSummary: Enterprise/trial access varies; not a broad simple free tier.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Important nuance: Inworld is not just a TTS vendor. It is a realtime orchestration/runtime layer. Represent it differently from plain model providers in your app.

supplementalResearch.title: 47. Inworld AI (US) — TTS ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 47. Inworld AI (US) — TTS ✓

**Status:** Active. **#1 ranked on Artificial Analysis Speech Arena** (ELO 1,160).

`TTS-1.5-Max` (**$10/1M chars**, ~200ms latency), `TTS-1.5-Mini` (**$5/1M chars**, ~120ms latency). **15 languages**. Free voice cloning (15s audio). REST + HTTP streaming + WebSocket. Open-source training code. On-premises available. **25× cheaper than ElevenLabs** claimed.
